Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND (bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/a100dcb1adee2b3ab4c7cf2f19b3a810e333898d88e588807f02281d006f8d25/66cac9a0-7072-4a14-8d02-a7cf50bf1c74/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
